overview: Jeskai Stoneblade is a tempo-control archetype that leverages card advantage to stabilize against early pressure and outvalue opponents over time. By cycling through the deck with draw spells, it reliably finds Stoneforge Mystic to fetch a signature weapon that dictates combat and board trades. The deck aims to control the pace of the game, using efficient removal and board wipes to clear paths for lethal damage.
win_conditions: Lethal combat damage with a signature weapon
Drawing out the opponent through superior card advantage
Clearing the board with a sweeper and finishing with a weapon

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more lands and early interaction
Hands containing Ponder or Brainstorm to dig for answers
Hands with Stoneforge Mystic and a way to play it on curve
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking removal or board interaction
Hands with four or more lands
Hands with no draw spells and slow mana development

early_game: Prioritize playing lands and casting draw spells to find answers
Hold removal for opponent's early threats rather than playing it preemptively
Play Stoneforge Mystic as soon as mana allows to begin fetching a weapon
mid_game: Fetch the signature weapon and use it to trade efficiently with opponent's creatures
Maintain board control by answering threats before they become unmanageable
Use draw spells to find sweepers or additional removal as the board state grows
late_game: Race the opponent by attacking with the weapon while holding up mana for interaction
Deploy board wipes to reset the game state and gain tempo advantage
Close out the game by leveraging card advantage to find finishers or lethal sequences

key_cards.name: Stoneforge Mystic
key_cards.role: Primary engine for fetching a signature weapon
key_cards.notes: Play on curve to accelerate weapon acquisition; hold up mana if needed to cast it later when the board is clearer.

key_cards.name: Ponder
key_cards.notes: Use to find removal, sweepers, or Stoneforge Mystic; always put back a land or relevant answer to maintain consistency.

key_cards.name: Brainstorm
key_cards.role: Rapid card advantage and deck thinning
key_cards.notes: Cast early to dig for key cards; be mindful of opponent's interaction and hold up mana for answers when facing aggressive decks.

sequencing_tips: Always hold up mana for interaction when facing unknown or aggressive strategies
Use Ponder before Brainstorm to ensure you are drawing into relevant answers
Delay fetching the weapon if the board is heavily populated with threats you cannot remove
Play draw spells before removal to ensure you have answers for the opponent's next turn

matchups.advice: Prioritize early removal and hold draw spells for answers; play Stoneforge Mystic on curve to fetch a weapon that can trade efficiently.
watch_for: Pressure that forces you to play draw spells without mana up

matchups.advice: Disrupt their casting sequence with early interaction; use draw spells to find specific answers and hold up mana for counterspells or removal.
watch_for: Card draw that signals a combo attempt
Mana left open for instant-speed plays

matchups.advice: Race by attacking with the weapon while holding interaction; use sweepers to clear their board and gain tempo advantage.
watch_for: Board wipes that reset your progress
Counterspells targeting your draw spells or Mystic
Late-game value engines that outdraw you

common_threats: Fast aggressive creatures that pressure life total early
Unexpected combo pieces that win on the spot
Board wipes that clear your signature weapon and creatures
